item.title:
BenDinnery: Ben Dinnery @BenDinnery · 8min #AFC #UCL
From Martin Odegaard... notes which will be published in tonight's matchday p
item.description:
Ben Dinnery @BenDinnery · 8min #AFC #UCL
From Martin Odegaard... notes which will be published in tonight's matchday programme.
'I had to go off during the second half of that game in Portugal last week, feeling my knee, which is why I missed the game at the weekend. I caught it a little bit against Mostrar más 1 3 1 mil

item.title: tabuteauS: Sam Tabuteau @tabuteauS · 18min A huge boost for Tottenham Cita Sky Sports News @SkySportsNews · 29min Rodrigo Bentancur
item.description: Sam Tabuteau @tabuteauS · 18min A huge boost for Tottenham Cita Sky Sports News @SkySportsNews · 29min Rodrigo Bentancur has returned to training for Tottenham Hotspur as the squad prepare for their Premier League fixture with Brighton on Saturday 367
